SavedTextMessage.Name: Vagos
SavedTextMessage.Message: Heard you were done, see you at the Hangout on 370S190E ~p~SanAndreas~s~. We owe you $3000

SavedTextMessage.Name: Diablos
SavedTextMessage.Message: We will be seeing each other shortly.

SavedTextMessage.Name: Officer Friendly
SavedTextMessage.Message: Always nice to help out a friend. Remember this number if you've got cop problems in the future.

SavedTextMessage.Name: Vagos
SavedTextMessage.Message: You're gonna make up for this mistake right? $14000 by 5/19/2026 12:00 PM.

SavedTextMessage.Name: Aztecas
SavedTextMessage.Message: Heard some good things about you, come see us sometime.

SavedTextMessage.Name: Diablos
SavedTextMessage.Message: You hiding from us? Not for long.

SavedTextMessage.Name: Vagos
SavedTextMessage.Message: Heard you were done, see you at the Hangout on 370S190E ~p~SanAndreas~s~. We owe you $3000

SavedTextMessage.Name: Diablos
SavedTextMessage.Message: We will be seeing each other shortly.

SavedTextMessage.Name: Officer Friendly
SavedTextMessage.Message: Always nice to help out a friend. Remember this number if you've got cop problems in the future.

SavedTextMessage.Name: Vagos
SavedTextMessage.Message: You're gonna make up for this mistake right? $14000 by 5/19/2026 12:00 PM.

SavedTextMessage.Message: Heard some good things about you, come see us sometime.

SavedTextMessage.Name: Diablos
